description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a combination of dark metal and natural wood cladding on its exterior. The structure includes a prominent gabled roof section and a flat-roofed garage area, with a stone driveway leading to a covered carport. Large, rectangular windows are asymmetrically placed, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is recessed beneath the gable, with a small set of steps and a sheltered porch area. The overall form is geometric and minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and a blend of industrial and natural materials. The house appears to be two stories tall, with a clear separation between living and garage spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with dark metal roofing, wood cladding, large windows, and a covered garage with a stone driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage with a white car, stone driveway, and the main gabled entryway with wood and dark metal finishes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall gabled section, vertical wood cladding, and main entryway with steps beneath the overhang.
description_view_2: Rear or roof view displaying the full expanse of the dark metal roof and the geometric layout of the structure.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing both the garage and main entry, with large windows and the driveway leading up to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, sheltered porch, and minimalistic overhang
